parameters.sqlQuery:
/* =========================================================
STEP 1: NORMALIZE domain_type VALUES
Convert different variants to canonical values used by rebate logic
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET domain_type =
CASE
  WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('renew', 'renewal') THEN 'renew'
  WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('new', 'registration', 'create') THEN 'new'
  WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('premium new', 'premium_new') THEN 'premium new'
  WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('premium renew', 'premium_renew') THEN 'premium renew'
  ELSE LOWER(domain_type)
END
WHERE TRUE;


/* =========================================================
STEP 2: INVALID domain_type CHECK
Flag rows where domain_type is not one of the supported values
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'INCORRECT_DOMAIN_TYPE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(domain_type) NOT IN (
  'new',
  'renew',
  'premium new',
  'premium renew'
)
AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 3: DOMAIN FORMAT VALIDATION
Check if the domain is a valid registrable domain
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'INVALID_DOMAIN_NAME',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE NET.REG_DOMAIN(domain) IS NULL
AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 4: DUPLICATE DOMAIN CHECK
Keep the earliest record and mark duplicates as errors
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'DUPLICATE_ENTRY',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE domain IN (
  SELECT domain
  FROM (
    SELECT
      domain,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY domain
        ORDER BY created_at
      ) AS rn
    FROM `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
    WHERE validation_error IS NULL
  )
  WHERE rn > 1
);


/* =========================================================
STEP 5: MISSING DOMAIN CHECK
Domain must exist for rebate processing
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE (domain IS NULL OR TRIM(domain) = '')
AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 6: MISSING DOMAIN_TYPE CHECK
Transaction type must be provided
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_DOMAIN_TYPE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE (domain_type IS NULL OR TRIM(domain_type) = '')
AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 7: MISSING DATE CHECK
Create/Renew date is required for rebate calculations
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_DATE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE date IS NULL
AND validation_error IS NULL;

/* =========================================================
STEP 8: MISSING CLIENT CHECK
Client must exist for rebate processing
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_CLIENT',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE (client IS NULL OR TRIM(client) = '')
AND validation_error IS NULL;

/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR NEW DOMAINS USING newreg TABLE
If domain_type = 'new' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_NEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.newreg` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR RENEW DOMAINS USING renews TABLE
If domain_type = 'renew' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_RENEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.renews` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR PREMIUM NEW DOMAINS USING premium_newreg TABLE
If domain_type = 'premium new' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_PREMIUM_NEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'premium new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR PREMIUM RENEW DOMAINS USING premium_renews TABLE
If domain_type = 'premium renew' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_PREMIUM_RENEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'premium renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR NEW DOMAINS USING newreg TABLE
If domain_type = 'new' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_NEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.newreg` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR RENEW DOMAINS USING renews TABLE
If domain_type = 'renew' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_RENEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.renews` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR PREMIUM NEW DOMAINS USING premium_newreg TABLE
If domain_type = 'premium new' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_PREMIUM_NEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'premium new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* =========================================================
STEP: MBG CHECK FOR PREMIUM RENEW DOMAINS USING premium_renews TABLE
If domain_type = 'premium renew' and matching record has MBG as NULL
========================================================= */

UPDATE `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_PREMIUM_RENEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'premium renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* -------- FIX PREMIUM NEW DOMAINS -------- */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  domain_type = 'premium new',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` p
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(p.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new';
  



/* -------- FIX PREMIUM RENEW DOMAINS -------- */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  domain_type = 'premium renew',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` p
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(p.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew';

WITH summary AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN validation_error IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS'
      ELSE validation_error
    END AS result,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
  GROUP BY result
),
totals AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NULL) AS success_rows,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NOT NULL) AS error_rows
  FROM `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
)
SELECT CONCAT(
  '✅ Rebate processing completed successfully', '\n\n',
  'Total rows: ', CAST(t.total_rows AS STRING), '\n',
  'Successful rows: ', CAST(t.success_rows AS STRING), '\n',
  'Failed rows: ', CAST(t.error_rows AS STRING), '\n\n',
  'Breakup:', '\n',
  STRING_AGG(
    CONCAT('• ', s.result, ': ', CAST(s.row_count AS STRING)),
    '\n'
    ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.result = 'SUCCESS' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.row_count DESC
  )
) AS flock_message
FROM summary s
CROSS JOIN totals t
GROUP BY t.total_rows, t.success_rows, t.error_rows;

/* =========================================================
STEP 1: POPULATE DATA FOR NEW DOMAIN REGISTRATIONS
Source table: radix_data.newreg
Logic:
- Pick the latest creation_date per domain
- Join with rebate_cleaned_data
- Apply only for domain_type = 'new'
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.creation_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.creation_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.newreg` n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 2: POPULATE DATA FOR DOMAIN RENEWALS
Source table: radix_data.renews
Logic:
- Pick the latest renew_date per domain
- Apply only for domain_type = 'renew'
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.renew_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.renew_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.renews` n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 3: POPULATE DATA FOR PREMIUM NEW REGISTRATIONS
Source table: radix_data.newreg
Logic:
- Pick latest creation_date per domain
- Apply only for domain_type = 'premium new'
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.creation_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.creation_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) in ('new','premium new')
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;


/* =========================================================
STEP 4: POPULATE DATA FOR PREMIUM RENEWALS
Source table: radix_data.premium_renews
Logic:
- Pick latest renew_date per domain
- Apply only for domain_type = 'premium renew'
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.renew_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.renew_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) in ('renew','premium renew')
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;

/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG OLD REGISTRATION / RENEWAL RECORDS

Logic:
- If createrenewdate is older than 180 days from today
- Mark the row as validation error
- Applies only where domain_id exists but record is too old
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'DATE_EXCEEDS_180_DAY_LIMIT',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE
  createrenewdate IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(createrenewdate) < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
  AND validation_error IS NULL;
/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG DELETED DOMAINS

Logic:
- If domain_id is still NULL after all lookup steps
- Check whether the domain exists in cnic_dump.deleted
- If yes, mark it as deleted domain
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'DOMAIN_MARKED_AS_DELETED',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `cnic_dump.deleted` d
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(d.domain)
  AND r.domain_id IS NULL
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;
/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG RESTORED DOMAINS
If domain exists in restore dump but was not matched earlier
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'DOMAIN_FOUND_IN_RESTORE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `cnic_dump.restore` d
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(d.domain)
  AND r.domain_id IS NULL
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;
/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG DOMAINS NOT FOUND IN SYSTEM

Logic:
- If domain lookup steps did not populate domain_id
- Mark record as validation error
- Prevent further rebate processing
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FOR_DOMAIN_TYPE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE
  domain_id IS NULL
  AND validation_error IS NULL;
